hooks.prompt: Review the Terraform/HCL code change for issues. Check for: 1) Using count instead of for_each for sets of similar resources (index-based addressing causes unnecessary destroys), 2) Missing backend encryption (encrypt = true for S3, CMEK for GCS), 3) Hardcoded values that should be variables (AMI IDs, instance types, CIDR blocks), 4) Missing lifecycle prevent_destroy on stateful resources (databases, S3 buckets with data), 5) Using latest tag or unpinned module source without version constraint, 6) Missing description on variables and outputs, 7) terraform_remote_state used where SSM Parameter Store would decouple better, 8) Missing validation blocks on variables that accept structured input, 9) depends_on on a module instead of explicit resource references (sledgehammer dependency), 10) State manipulation commands in automation without state backup (missing terraform state pull before mv/rm). Return {"ok": true} if no issues, or {"ok": false, "reason": "specific issue found"} if problems detected.
